rules.headings: Use tracking-tight for all headings. Never use Inter or standard sans-serif.
rules.labels: Overlines and labels MUST be uppercase, text-xs, with wide tracking (tracking-[0.2em]).
rules.numbers: All financial figures, prices, charts, and metrics MUST use JetBrains Mono to ensure tabular alignment and prevent jitter during live updates.
rules.hierarchy: Max text size for primary dashboard numbers is text-4xl. Max for landing/login pages is text-6xl.

layout_and_spacing.padding: Containers with borders must use generous internal padding (p-6) unless it's a dense data table (p-2).
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: Sharp edges required. Use rounded-none or max rounded-sm (4px). Avoid default Shadcn rounded-lg.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton. Container uses border-collapse layout style, panels have 1px solid border. NO soft drop shadows.

components.navigation: Sticky top nav. Use glassmorphism (bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-xl) with a hard bottom border (border-white/10).
components.buttons: Flat, sharp borders. Action buttons (Buy/Sell) use solid background (Profit/Loss colors) with black/white text. Secondary buttons use transparent background with border-white/20.
components.tables_and_lists: Data rows must have hover:bg-white/5. Text left-aligned, monetary numbers right-aligned.
components.charts: Recharts library. Dark theme. Remove grid lines or make them extremely faint (stroke-white/5). Use neon green/red lines.
components.ai_panel: Visually distinguish Gemini AI explanations using the ai_insight color (#0066FF) for borders or subtle background tint (bg-[#0066FF]/10).

motion.tickers: Price changes must briefly flash bg-[#00E559]/20 (up) or bg-[#FF3333]/20 (down) using CSS animations.
motion.loading: Avoid generic spinners. Use terminal-style blinking blocks or ASCII-style progress.

hero_login_bg.description: Futuristic abstract dark geometric hexagonal pattern. Use for login/signup screens or marketing sections. CRITICAL: Overlay with bg-black/70 to ensure text readability.

abstract_graph.description: Abstract streaks of blue and red light at night. Use for empty states, placeholders, or decorative banners.

bitcoin_logo.description: Glowing neon Bitcoin symbol. Use as the hero/fallback visual for BTC.

ethereum_logo.description: Gold and black round Ethereum emblem. Use as the hero/fallback visual for ETH.

trader_avatar.description: Stock trader analyzing data. Use for user profile avatar placeholder or testimonials.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-end, professional Crypto Trading Terminal. The tone is intense, precise, and authoritative.
CRITICAL: Add `data-testid` attributes to ALL interactive elements, forms, and key informational nodes.
CRITICAL: Inject the Google Fonts import into your global CSS (index.css). Do not use default Inter font.
Strip default Shadcn 'softness' (borders, radiuses, shadows). Use sharp, technical 1px borders.
Prioritize data density. Use the 'Control Room Grid' for the dashboard layout.
Use Phosphor icons (@phosphor-icons/react) if possible for dense dashboards, otherwise use strictly sharp/technical variants of Lucide.
Avoid color gradients except in specific AI-highlighted areas. Rely on solid colors and 1px borders.
